submission.format: one JSON object with no surrounding narrative
submission.numeric_rule: Report scored decimal values to 4 decimal places. Counts are integers.
submission.identifier_rule: ISO3 values are uppercase. Set-like identifier lists are unique and sorted ascending.

fields.requested_label_count: integer; labels in the analyst request
fields.alias_resolution_count: integer; resolved labels that differ from the canonical country name
fields.resolved_iso3: list[string]; all uniquely resolved ISO3 identifiers, sorted ascending

fields.applied_revision_event_ids: list[string]; applicable APPLIED revision_event_id values, sorted ascending
fields.nonapplied_revision_event_ids: list[string]; applicable non-APPLIED revision_event_id values, sorted ascending
fields.anomaly_observation_keys: list[string]; unresolved scale-break cells as ISO3|YEAR|indicator_id, sorted ascending
fields.raw_missing_2022_cells: integer; missing requested indicator cells before anomaly exclusions
fields.anomaly_2022_cells: integer; unresolved scale-break cells in the 2022 cross-section
fields.imputed_2022_cells: integer; total 2022 cells imputed after quality exclusions
fields.usable_country_count: integer; rows in the completed PCA matrix
fields.usable_indicator_count: integer; columns in the completed PCA matrix

top_absolute_loadings.ordering: descending absolute loading; indicator_id ascending breaks an exact tie

fields.high_burden_iso3: list[string]; three-cluster high-burden membership, sorted ascending

fields.pc1_coefficient: number; life-expectancy years per PC1 burden unit, 4 decimals
